title: CraftableBoats
description: Conquer the Nether's molten seas. Craft boats from hellish wood that defy fire and lava. A seamless addition to your vanilla survival.
body:
CraftableBoats: Nether Update
Tired of your wooden boats burning to a crisp the moment you venture into the Nether? This data pack elegantly solves that problem by adding craftable boats made from Crimson and Warped wood!

Features:

New Crafting Recipes: Adds two new boat recipes to your crafting table. Simply arrange Crimson or Warped planks in the classic boat pattern to create a matching Nether boat.

Full Integration: The crafted boats are the standard Minecraft boats but with the unique nether wood texture. They function identically to regular boats but have the distinct aesthetic of the Nether.

Fire Resistance: True to their nether origin, these boats are immune to fire and lava. They will not burn or take damage from lava, making them the perfect vessels for exploring the dangerous lava lakes of the Nether.

Compatibility: This is a pure data pack for Minecraft 1.20.1. It doesn't require any mods, clientside or server-side, ensuring maximum compatibility with other data packs and a vanilla experience.

This data pack stays true to the vanilla Minecraft spirit, simply and logically expanding the game's possibilities. Perfect for survival in the Nether and Nether-themed builds!
